task_completion.description: Patient 'Ana Betz' is selected for the lab test request
task_completion.visual_evidence: A lab test request form is visible with 'Ana Betz' (or 'Ana Isabel Betz') entered in the patient field.

task_completion.description: Health professional 'Cordara, Cameron' and today's date are entered
task_completion.visual_evidence: The requesting health professional field shows 'Cordara, Cameron' and the date field shows the current date.
The test type or analysis field clearly shows 'GLYCATED HEMOGLOBIN (HbA1c)' or 'HbA1c'.

task_completion.description: Result value '7.2' and unit '%' are recorded
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the results or findings section of the lab test, the value '7.2' is entered alongside the unit '%'.

task_completion.description: The lab test record is validated
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status of the lab test record shows as 'Validated' (often indicated by a status badge, text, or a grayed-out/completed workflow state).

integrity.description: The agent used the GNU Health graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GNU Health desktop client being used to navigate and enter data.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or database scripts to insert the record
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQL commands (e.g., psql) or Python scripts being executed to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application rather than a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The data entry is happening within the structured fields of the GNU Health application, not written out in a text editor or notes app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected patient name is 'Ana Betz' (may appear as 'Ana Isabel Betz' in the system). The required test type is 'GLYCATED HEMOGLOBIN (HbA1c)'. The result value must be exactly '7.2' with the unit '%'. The final status of the lab test record must be 'Validated'.
